GitHub Blog Scholar Contact

Jantram is an AI research group at IIT Kharagpur focused on Agentic AI, Natural Language Processing, and Applied Machine Learning. We build systems that understand language, reason over complex inputs, and act autonomously in real-world environments. Our work spans foundational research and practical tools, with the goal of making intelligent systems more capable, interpretable, and reliable.

Software and Demos

View on Github ↗

Agentic AI

AgentTrace Explorer

Visualize and inspect multi-step reasoning chains produced by language agents. Upload a task trace and explore decision points, tool calls, and backtracking behavior interactively.

Live Try it

NLP

DocIE Annotator

Run our structured information extraction model on scientific PDFs. Extracts entities, relations, and structured tables from heterogeneous documents in real time.

Live Try it

Applied ML

SparseAdapt Playground

Experiment with sparse functional updates for LLM fine-tuning. Configure sparsity level, target layers, and task type, then benchmark against full fine-tuning baselines.

Beta Try it

NLP · Low-Resource

CrossLingual NER

Named entity recognition for low-resource languages via cross-lingual transfer. Supports 18 African languages. Paste text or upload a document for instant entity annotation.

Coming soon Notify me
